title: Bendu Apparao R.M.P
subTitle: Dr Bendu Apparao, a deceitful man, will go to any lengths to swindle money from his unsuspecting patients. However, when a dying patient leaves behind a large sum of money meant to support his family, Bendu instead uses it for his own purposes.

title: Rowdy Boys
subTitle: Kavya, a medical student, and Akshay, an engineering student, begin to fall for each other. However, an ugly gang war between their respective colleges impacts their love story.

title: Thandel
subTitle: Raju, an Indian fisherman, is arrested after accidentally straying into foreign waters and faces a fraught journey home to his beloved Satya.

title: A Aa
subTitle: Anasuya, the daughter of a rich and strict businesswoman, and Anand, a former chef from a middle-class family, fall in love. However, their background and family feud threatens their romance.

title: Indra
subTitle: Indrasen and Shivraj's families are rivals residing in a village. However, one day, the people of the village seek Indrasen's help to build a water reservoir, but he is stopped by his enemy, Shivraj.

title: Ravanasura
subTitle: Ravindra, an inept junior lawyer at a law firm, agrees to help a business magnate clear her father's name of murder. However, when bodies start piling up, Ravindra begins to show his true colours.
